<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" dir="ltr">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <title>404 Page</title>
    <style>
      * {
        -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
                box-sizing: border-box;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0px;
        padding: 0px;
        font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji";
        color: #383a42;
        line-height: 1.4;
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }
      .wrapper {
        display: block;
        position: relative;
        width: 100vw;
        height: 100vh;
      }
      .wrapper .container {
        display: -webkit-box;
        display: -ms-flexbox;
        display: flex;
        max-width: 1170px;
        margin: auto;
        padding-left: 100px;
        padding-right: 100px;
        position: relative;
        top: 50%;
        -webkit-transform: translateY(-50%);
            -ms-transform: translateY(-50%);
                transform: translateY(-50%);
      }
      h1 {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 100px;
        line-height: 80px;
        margin: 35px 0px 40px 0px;
      }
      p {
        display: block;
        -webkit-margin-before: 0em;
                margin-block-start: 0em;
        -webkit-margin-after: 0em;
                margin-block-end: 0em;
        -webkit-margin-start: 0px;
                margin-inline-start: 0px;
        -webkit-margin-end: 0px;
                margin-inline-end: 0px;
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 400;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        max-width: 290px;
      }
      .error-code {
        color: red;
        font-weight: bold;
        font-size: 16px;
      }
      .btn {
        border-radius: 30px;
        padding: 15px 30px;
        background: #007AE0;
        color: #fff;
        text-decoration: none;
        display: inline-block;
        -webkit-transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        -o-transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        margin-top: 10px;
      }
      .btn:hover {
        text-decoration: none;
        background: #005BA8;
      }
      .col-left {
        width: 50%;
      }
      .col-right {
        width: 50%;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .col-right img {
        display: inline-block;
        margin: auto;
        max-height: 380px;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 10;
      }

      @media (max-height: 568px) {
        .wrapper .container {
          margin-top: 50px;
          margin-bottom: 50px;
        }
      }

      @media (max-width: 767px) {
        .wrapper .container {
          -ms-flex-wrap: nowrap;
              flex-wrap: nowrap;
          -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
          -webkit-box-direction: normal;
              -ms-flex-flow: column;
                  flex-flow: column;
          padding-left: 20px;
          padding-right: 20px;
        }
        .col-left {
          width: 100%;
          display: block;
          -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 3;
              -ms-flex-order: 2;
                  order: 2;
          text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
          margin: 20px 0px 10px 0px;
          font-size: 60px;
        }
        p {
          max-width: 100%;
        }
        .col-right {
          width: 100%;
          display: block;
          text-align: center;
          -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 2;
              -ms-flex-order: 1;
                  order: 1;
        }
        .col-right img {
          max-height: 200px;
          margin: auto;
          display: inline-block;
        }
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="wrapper">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="col-left">
          <h1>Oops!</h1>
          <p>We can’t seem to find the page you’re looking for.</p>
          <p class="error-code">Error Code: 404</p>
          <a href="/" class="btn">Back to Home</a>
        </div>
        <div class="col-right">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Broken robot image">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>
